sentences.target: Ich gehe los, nachdem ich gegessen habe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈɡeːə loːs naːxˈdeːm ɪç ɡəˈɡɛsn̩ ˈhaːbə/

translations.de: Ich gehe los, nachdem ich gegessen habe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈɡeːə loːs naːxˈdeːm ɪç ɡəˈɡɛsn̩ ˈhaːbə/
translations.en: I head out after I eat.
translations.vi: Tôi ra ngoài sau khi ăn.
translations.nl: Ik ga weg nadat ik heb gegeten.
translations.uk: Я виходжу після того, як поїм.
translations.nb: Jeg drar ut etter at jeg har spist.
translations.sv: Jag går ut efter att ha ätit.
translations.da: Jeg går ud, efter jeg har spist.
translations.ja: 食べてから出かけます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative; used with the separable particle 'los' to form the verb 'losgehen' (to set off/start).
Separable verb particle; combines with 'gehen' to form 'losgehen' (to set off/start).
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause meaning 'after'.
Subject pronoun of the subordinate clause.
Past participle of 'essen'; lexical verb in a perfect construction within the subordinate clause.
Auxiliary 'haben' (present); forms the present perfect together with the participle in the subordinate clause.

sentences.target: Ich gehe einkaufen, nachdem ich geduscht habe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈɡeːə ˈaɪnˌkaʊfn̩ naːxˈdeːm ɪç ɡəˈdʊʃt ˈhaːbə/

translations.de: Ich gehe einkaufen, nachdem ich geduscht habe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈɡeːə ˈaɪnˌkaʊfn̩ naːxˈdeːm ɪç ɡəˈdʊʃt ˈhaːbə/
translations.en: I go shopping after I shower.
translations.es: Voy de compras después de ducharme.
translations.fr: Je vais faire les courses après ma douche.
translations.it: Vado a fare la spesa dopo la doccia.
translations.ru: Я иду за покупками после душа.
translations.pt: Eu vou às compras depois de tomar banho.
translations.he: אני הולך לקניות אחרי שאני מתקלח.
translations.vi: Tôi đi mua sắm sau khi tắm.
translations.nl: Ik ga boodschappen doen nadat ik gedoucht heb.
translations.uk: Я йду за покупками після душу.
translations.hi: नहाने के बाद मैं खरीदारी करने जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Πάω για ψώνια αφού κάνω ντους.
translations.nb: Jeg handler etter at jeg har dusjet.
translations.sv: Jag går och handlar efter att jag har duschat.
translations.ro: Merg la cumpărături după ce fac duș.
translations.da: Jeg handler ind, efter jeg har været i bad.
translations.ja: シャワーを浴びてから買い物に行きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative; takes a bare infinitive complement ('einkaufen').
Bare infinitive complement (activity) of 'gehen'; separable verb but not split here.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause meaning 'after'.
Subject pronoun of the subordinate clause.
Past participle of 'duschen'; lexical verb in a perfect construction within the subordinate clause.
Auxiliary 'haben' (present); forms the present perfect together with the participle in the subordinate clause.

sentences.target: Er ruft an, nachdem er angekommen ist.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʁuːft an naːxˈdeːm eːɐ̯ ˈanɡəˌkɔmən ɪst/

translations.de: Er ruft an, nachdem er angekommen ist.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʁuːft an naːxˈdeːm eːɐ̯ ˈanɡəˌkɔmən ɪst/
translations.ru: Он звонит после того, как приедет.
translations.vi: Anh ấy gọi điện sau khi đến nơi.
translations.nl: Hij belt nadat hij is aangekomen.
translations.uk: Він телефонує після того, як приїде.
translations.hi: वह पहुँचने के बाद फोन करता है.
translations.nb: Han ringer etter at han har kommet fram.
translations.sv: Han ringer efter att han har kommit fram.
translations.da: Han ringer, efter han er ankommet.
translations.ja: 彼は着いたら電話します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative; part of the separable verb 'anrufen' (to call).
Separable verb particle; combines with 'rufen' to form 'anrufen' (to call).
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause meaning 'after'.
Subject pronoun of the subordinate clause.
Past participle of the separable verb 'ankommen' (to arrive); the prefix 'an-' is not separated in the participle; lexical verb in perfect construction.
Auxiliary 'sein' (present); forms the present perfect with an intransitive verb of motion/state ('angekommen').

sentences.target: Wir essen, nachdem die Kinder nach Hause gekommen sind.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsn̩ naːxˈdeːm diː ˈkɪndɐ naːx ˈhaʊzə ɡəˈkɔmən zɪnt/

translations.de: Wir essen, nachdem die Kinder nach Hause gekommen sind.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsn̩ naːxˈdeːm diː ˈkɪndɐ naːx ˈhaʊzə ɡəˈkɔmən zɪnt/
translations.en: We eat after the kids get home.
translations.es: Comemos después de que los niños llegan a casa.
translations.fr: On mange quand les enfants rentrent.
translations.it: Mangiamo quando i bambini tornano a casa.
translations.ko: 아이들이 집에 오고 나서 밥을 먹어요.
translations.yue: 啲小朋友返屋企之後我哋先食飯。
translations.ru: Мы едим после того, как дети приходят домой.
translations.pt: Nós comemos depois que as crianças chegam em casa.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים אחרי שהילדים חוזרים הביתה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn sau khi bọn trẻ về nhà.
translations.ar: نأكل بعد أن يعود الأطفال إلى البيت.
translations.nl: We eten nadat de kinderen thuis sąn.
translations.uk: Ми їмо після того, як діти повертаються додому.
translations.hi: बच्चों के घर आने के बाद हम खाना खाते हैं.
translations.pl: Jemy, gdy dzieci wracają do domu.
translations.el: Τρώμε αφού γυρίσουν τα παιδιά σπίτι.
translations.nb: Vi spiser etter at ungene har kommet hjem.
translations.sv: Vi äter efter att barnen har kommit hem.
translations.ro: Mâncăm după ce copiii ajung acasă.
translations.cs: Jíme, až se děti vrátí domů.
translations.da: Vi spiser, efter børnene er kommet hjem.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが帰ってきてから食べます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the main clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause meaning 'after'.
Definite article marking the plural noun 'Kinder'; here introducing the subject of the subordinate clause.
Plural noun; subject of the subordinate clause.
Preposition indicating direction toward a place; here part of the fixed directional phrase 'nach Hause' (homeward).
Noun in the fixed expression 'nach Hause' meaning 'homeward'; historically dative form.
Past participle of 'kommen'; lexical verb in perfect construction within the subordinate clause.
Auxiliary 'sein' (present); forms the present perfect together with 'gekommen' in the subordinate clause.

jp: Ich gehe los, nachdem ich gegessen habe.
Ich gehe einkaufen, nachdem ich geduscht habe.
Er ruft an, nachdem er angekommen ist.
Wir essen, nachdem die Kinder nach Hause gekommen sind.
